TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Al-Farouq_Aminu, title = Al-Farouq_Aminu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al-Farouq_Aminu} }

S.FORM: Al-Farouq Aminu hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing, pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 9, Al-Farouq Aminu, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Al-Farouq Aminu mqwas biru sa Norcross pqwsan biru seneng, Georgia, U.S. Al-Farouq Aminu, t'aring kawas tay 2008 tehuk kawas tay 2010, mqwas biru sa Wake Forest pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya Al-Farouq Aminu maki msqun ki Helina Tekeste Aminu. Alade Aminu hiya' ga, sswe' ni Al-Farouq Aminu. mintzyuwaw nya Al-Farouq Aminu hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy. t'aring sa kawas 2010, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA ru mqwas. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Al-Farouq Aminu hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing, pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 9, Al-Farouq Aminu, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Al-Farouq Aminu mqwas biru sa Norcross pqwsan biru seneng, Georgia, U.S. Al-Farouq Aminu, t'aring kawas tay 2008 tehuk kawas tay 2010, mqwas biru sa Wake Forest pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya Al-Farouq Aminu maki msqun ki Helina Tekeste Aminu. Alade Aminu hiya' ga, sswe' ni Al-Farouq Aminu. mintzyuwaw nya Al-Farouq Aminu hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy. t'aring sa kawas 2010, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA ru mqwas. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: al-*arouq aminu ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ, pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, al-*arouq aminu, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja al-*arouq aminu mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa norʦ~ʨros~ɕs~ɕ pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, ɣeorɣia, u.s~ɕ. al-*arouq aminu, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa wake *ores~ɕt pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. qnxan nja al-*arouq aminu maki ms~ɕqun ki ħelina tekes~ɕte aminu. ala*e aminu ħijaʔ ɣa, s~ɕs~ɕweʔ ni al-*arouq aminu. mintzjuwaw nja al-*arouq aminu ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa ru mqwas~ɕ. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
